ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity in kilometers */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the activity in kilometers per hour */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "climb" INTEGER /* Elevation climb during the activity in meters */,
  "average_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity in beats per minute */,
  "quality" REAL /* Quality score of the activity based on performance metrics */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Starting location of the activity */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the activity */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Device used to record the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user's account */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Fitness level of the user (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last recorded activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., running, cycling, hiking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "icon_path" TEXT /* Path to the icon representing the activity type */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the activity type (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type the goal is for */,
  "target_distance" REAL /* Target distance to achieve in kilometers */,
  "target_calories" INTEGER /* Target calories to burn */,
  "target_climb" INTEGER /* Target elevation climb in meters */,
  "target_duration" INTEGER /* Target duration for the activity in minutes */,
  "target_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Target average heart rate for the activity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the goal */,
  "goal_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "badge_image" TEXT /* Image path for the badge */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points assigned for earning the badge */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., distance, calories, time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "user_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-badge association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge earned */,
  "earn_date" TEXT /* Date when the badge was earned */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user for the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the challenge */,
  "reward_badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge awarded for completing the challenge */,
  "participation_fee" INTEGER /* Participation fee for the challenge */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the challenge */,
  "challenge_type" TEXT /* Type of challenge (e.g., distance, time, elevation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_reward_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_challenges" (
  "user_challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-challenge association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who joined the challenge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge joined */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the challenge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user in the challenge (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "progress_distance" REAL /* Progress in terms of distance */,
  "progress_calories" INTEGER /* Progress in terms of calories burned */,
  "progress_climb" INTEGER /* Progress in terms of elevation climb */,
  "progress_duration" INTEGER /* Progress in terms of duration */,
  "challenge_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_challenges_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_challenges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity for which feedback is provided */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the activity on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user about the activity */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)
